# growthbook_sdk_connection (Resource)

A GrowthBook SDK connection. SDK connections expose feature and experiment definitions to client/server SDKs for a given environment.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "growthbook_sdk_connection" "web_prod" {
  name        = "web-production"
  language    = "javascript"
  environment = growthbook_environment.production.id
  projects    = [growthbook_project.web.id]

  encrypt_payload            = true
  include_visual_experiments = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment` (String) Environment this connection serves.
- `language` (String) Primary SDK language (e.g. `javascript`, `react`, `go`, `python`).
- `name` (String) Name of the SDK connection.

### Optional

- `allowed_custom_fields_in_metadata` (List of String) Custom field keys allowed in payload metadata.
- `encrypt_payload` (Boolean) Encrypt the SDK payload.
- `hash_secure_attributes` (Boolean) Hash secure attributes before sending to the SDK.
- `include_custom_fields_in_metadata` (Boolean) Include custom fields in payload metadata.
- `include_draft_experiment_refs` (Boolean) Include experiment-ref rules linked to draft experiments.
- `include_draft_experiments` (Boolean) Include draft experiments in the payload.
- `include_experiment_names` (Boolean) Include experiment and variation names in the payload.
- `include_project_id_in_metadata` (Boolean) Include the project ID in payload metadata.
- `include_redirect_experiments` (Boolean) Include URL redirect experiments in the payload.
- `include_rule_ids` (Boolean) Include feature rule IDs in the payload.
- `include_tags_in_metadata` (Boolean) Include tags in payload metadata.
- `include_visual_experiments` (Boolean) Include visual experiments in the payload.
- `projects` (List of String) Project IDs this connection is scoped to. Empty means all projects.
- `proxy_enabled` (Boolean) Enable the GrowthBook proxy for this connection.
- `proxy_host` (String) Proxy host URL when the proxy is enabled.
- `remote_eval_enabled` (Boolean) Enable remote evaluation.
- `saved_group_references_enabled` (Boolean) Enable saved group references in the payload.
- `sdk_version` (String) Pinned SDK version for payload compatibility.

### Read-Only

- `encryption_key` (String, Sensitive) Payload encryption key (when encryption is enabled).
- `id` (String) Unique SDK connection identifier.
- `key` (String) Client key used by SDKs to fetch features.
- `languages` (List of String) All languages associated with the connection, as returned by the API.
- `organization` (String) Owning organization ID.
- `proxy_signing_key` (String, Sensitive) Proxy signing key.
- `sse_enabled` (Boolean) Whether server-sent events streaming is enabled.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# SDK connections are imported by their GrowthBook ID.
terraform import growthbook_sdk_connection.web_prod sdk-abc123
```
